manifest.safety_scope: Public-source strategic dependency mapping only. No classified data, no operational tactics, no weapon construction instructions.
notes: Public-source v0.1 database for the European defence stack.
This is a strategic dependency graph, not a supplier-contract database.
Edges marked fact_status=inferred are system-level dependency hypotheses.
Designed for Codex ingestion and website graph generation.
France/EU lens is intentionally strong because the user is based in France and is interested in B2B/national opportunities.

edis.title: European Commission — EDIS | Our common defence industrial strategy
edis.notes: EDIS sets a vision for European defence industrial policy until 2035 and emphasizes strengthening EDTIB, readiness, collaborative investment and strategic partnerships.

edf.title: European Commission — European Defence Fund
edf.notes: EDF supports collaborative defence research and development across EU member states; nearly €7.3B budget for 2021-2027.

edip.title: European Commission — EDIP | Forging Europe's Defence
edip.notes: European Defence Industry Programme policy context; may need enrichment when final regulation/source page is stable.

eda.title: European Defence Agency
eda.notes: European Defence Agency coordinates capability development, defence research, training and collaborative defence initiatives.

card.title: European Defence Agency — Coordinated Annual Review on Defence
card.notes: CARD monitors European defence capability landscape and collaboration opportunities.

eudis.title: EUDIS — EU Defence Innovation Scheme
eudis.notes: EU defence innovation scheme supporting startups, SMEs and disruptive defence technologies.

pesco.title: PESCO — Permanent Structured Cooperation
pesco.notes: EU framework for defence cooperation projects among member states.

occar.title: OCCAR — Organisation for Joint Armament Cooperation
occar.notes: European joint armament programme management organization.

nato_diana.title: NATO DIANA
nato_diana.notes: NATO Defence Innovation Accelerator for the North Atlantic.

france_dga.title: Direction générale de l'armement — DGA
france_dga.notes: French armament procurement and technology agency.

france2030.title: France 2030
france2030.notes: French strategic investment plan, useful for dual-use industrial/technology lens.

airbus_defence.title: Airbus — Defence
airbus_defence.notes: Airbus defence portfolio includes military aircraft, UAS, FCAS, military space, connectivity, intelligence/data and Multi-Domain Combat Cloud.

thales_defence.title: Thales — Defence and Security
thales_defence.notes: Thales defence/security portfolio; sensors, cybersecurity, communications, C4ISR, avionics, space and naval systems.

leonardo_defence.title: Leonardo — Defence & Security
leonardo_defence.notes: Leonardo defence/security portfolio: aircraft, helicopters, electronics, sensors, space and cyber/security.

rheinmetall_defence.title: Rheinmetall — Defence
rheinmetall_defence.notes: Rheinmetall defence portfolio: vehicles, weapons/ammunition, air defence, electronics and soldier systems.

mbda.title: MBDA
mbda.notes: European missile systems company; complex weapon systems, air defence, deep strike, force protection and air dominance products.

dassault_defense.title: Dassault Aviation — Defense
dassault_defense.notes: Dassault defense aircraft and Rafale ecosystem.

safran_defense.title: Safran — Defense
safran_defense.notes: Safran defence markets: optronics, navigation, electronics, propulsion and aircraft equipment.

naval_group.title: Naval Group
naval_group.notes: French naval defence group: submarines, surface ships, combat systems, services.

knds.title: KNDS
knds.notes: European land systems company formed by Krauss-Maffei Wegmann and Nexter; tanks, artillery and land systems.

bae_systems.title: BAE Systems
bae_systems.notes: UK-based defence, aerospace and security company.

saab.title: Saab
saab.notes: Swedish defence and security company: aeronautics, surveillance, naval, land and advanced systems.

hensoldt.title: Hensoldt
hensoldt.notes: German sensor solutions company for defence and security.

kongsberg.title: Kongsberg Defence & Aerospace
kongsberg.notes: Norwegian defence/aerospace company: missiles, air defence, space, naval and command systems.

diehl_defence.title: Diehl Defence
diehl_defence.notes: German defence company with air defence, guided missiles, ammunition and protection systems.

patria.title: Patria
patria.notes: Finnish defence and technology company: vehicles, maintenance, lifecycle support and systems.

bittium.title: Bittium Defence & Security
bittium.notes: Finnish secure communications and defence/security systems.

rohde_schwarz_defence.title: Rohde & Schwarz — Defence
rohde_schwarz_defence.notes: Secure communications, test and measurement, electronic warfare and monitoring.

helsing.title: Helsing
helsing.notes: European software and AI defence company.

quantum_systems.title: Quantum Systems
quantum_systems.notes: German aerial intelligence / unmanned systems company.

tekever.title: TEKEVER
tekever.notes: Portuguese unmanned systems and surveillance company.

arx_robotics.title: ARX Robotics
arx_robotics.notes: German defence robotics and autonomous ground systems startup.

unseenlabs.title: Unseenlabs
unseenlabs.notes: French maritime surveillance by space-based RF detection.

preligens.title: Preligens / Safran AI
preligens.notes: AI for intelligence and geospatial analysis; now associated with Safran AI.

delair.title: Delair
delair.notes: French drone and aerial intelligence company.

harfanglab.title: HarfangLab
harfanglab.notes: French endpoint detection and cybersecurity company.

sentrycs.title: Sentrycs
sentrycs.notes: Counter-drone cyber/RF detection and mitigation company.

galileo_prs.title: EU Agency for the Space Programme — Galileo PRS
galileo_prs.notes: Galileo Public Regulated Service for government-authorised users.

nodes.name: European Defence Stack
nodes.description: Public-source map of European defence industry, capability layers, bottlenecks and opportunity zones.

nodes.name: Policy / Funding / Procurement Layer
nodes.description: EU, NATO and national funding/procurement structures shaping defence demand.

nodes.name: Defence Prime Layer
nodes.description: Major European defence primes and system integrators.

nodes.name: Land Systems Layer
nodes.strategic_role: Armoured vehicles, artillery and land platforms
nodes.description: Tanks, armoured vehicles, artillery, ground robotics and land platform modernization.

nodes.name: Air Combat Layer
nodes.strategic_role: Combat aircraft and collaborative air systems
nodes.description: Combat aircraft, FCAS/SCAF, Eurofighter, Rafale, air combat cloud and loyal wingman concepts.

nodes.name: Naval Systems Layer
nodes.description: Surface combatants, submarines, naval combat systems, maritime surveillance and lifecycle support.

nodes.name: Missiles / Air Defence Layer
nodes.description: Missiles, interceptors, air defence, deep strike and force protection systems.

nodes.name: C4ISR / Sensors Layer
nodes.description: Command, control, communications, computers, intelligence, surveillance, reconnaissance, sensors and battlefield management.

nodes.name: Cyber / Electronic Warfare Layer
nodes.description: Cybersecurity, electronic warfare, signals intelligence, spectrum monitoring, secure systems and resilience.

nodes.name: Space / Secure Connectivity Layer
nodes.description: Satcom, ISR, navigation, PRS, secure connectivity, space situational awareness and maritime RF intelligence.

nodes.name: Drones / Autonomy Layer
nodes.description: Uncrewed aerial systems, ground robotics, autonomous ISR, counter-UAS and autonomy software.

nodes.name: Ammunition / Energetics Layer
nodes.description: Munitions, propellants, explosives, energetics, missile motors and production capacity.

nodes.name: Industrial Supply Chain Layer
nodes.description: Components, semiconductors, machine tools, raw materials, workforce, certification, test ranges and production ramp-up.

nodes.name: Simulation / Training Layer
nodes.description: Simulation, digital twins, training systems, mission rehearsal and test/evaluation tooling.

nodes.name: Defence AI / Software Layer
nodes.description: AI, data fusion, autonomy, targeting assistance, battle management, secure deployment and decision support.

nodes.name: DG DEFIS
nodes.strategic_role: EU Defence Industry and Space directorate
nodes.description: European Commission directorate for defence industry and space.

nodes.name: European Defence Industrial Strategy
nodes.description: First-ever European Defence Industrial Strategy: strengthens EDTIB, readiness and European collaboration.

nodes.name: European Defence Fund
nodes.description: EU fund supporting collaborative defence research and capability development.

nodes.name: European Defence Industry Programme
nodes.description: Programme framework for strengthening EU defence industrial readiness and joint procurement.

nodes.name: EU Defence Innovation Scheme
nodes.description: Innovation support for disruptive defence technologies, startups and SMEs.

nodes.name: European Defence Agency
nodes.description: Agency supporting capability development and collaboration among member states.

nodes.name: Coordinated Annual Review on Defence
nodes.description: Mechanism for identifying defence capability trends, gaps and cooperation opportunities.

nodes.name: PESCO
nodes.description: Framework for collaborative defence projects across participating EU member states.

nodes.name: OCCAR
nodes.description: Programme management organization for joint armament cooperation.

nodes.name: NATO DIANA
nodes.description: Accelerator for dual-use technologies across the NATO ecosystem.

nodes.name: DGA
nodes.description: French armament procurement and technology agency.

nodes.name: Agence de l'innovation de défense
nodes.description: French agency focused on defence innovation and dual-use technology scouting.

nodes.name: France 2030
nodes.description: French strategic investment programme relevant to deeptech, industrial sovereignty and dual-use technology.

nodes.name: IRIS² Secure Connectivity
nodes.description: EU secure connectivity satellite constellation programme.

nodes.name: Galileo PRS
nodes.description: Encrypted navigation service for government-authorised users.

nodes.name: GOVSATCOM
nodes.description: Governmental satellite communications capability for EU users.

nodes.name: Airbus Defence and Space
nodes.description: Military aircraft, UAS, FCAS, military space, connectivity, intelligence/data and Multi-Domain Combat Cloud.

nodes.name: Thales
nodes.strategic_role: European defence electronics and systems prime
nodes.description: Defence electronics, radars, sensors, communications, cyber, space and C4ISR.

nodes.name: Leonardo
nodes.description: Aircraft, helicopters, sensors, electronics, cyber/security and space systems.

nodes.name: Rheinmetall
nodes.description: Military vehicles, weapons, ammunition, air defence, electronics and soldier systems.

nodes.name: MBDA
nodes.description: European complex weapon systems and missile company across air, land and naval domains.

nodes.name: Dassault Aviation
nodes.description: Rafale and combat aircraft design/manufacturing ecosystem.

nodes.name: Safran
nodes.description: Optronics, navigation, electronics, engines/propulsion and aircraft equipment.

nodes.name: Naval Group
nodes.description: Submarines, surface ships, naval combat systems and lifecycle services.

nodes.name: KNDS
nodes.description: Tanks, artillery, armoured vehicles and land systems.

nodes.name: BAE Systems
nodes.description: Major defence, aerospace and security company.

nodes.name: Saab
nodes.description: Aeronautics, surveillance, naval, land and advanced defence systems.

nodes.name: Indra
nodes.description: Defence/security systems, C4ISR, radars, simulation, command systems.

nodes.name: Hensoldt
nodes.description: Radar, optronics, electronic warfare and sensor systems.

nodes.name: Kongsberg Defence & Aerospace
nodes.description: Missiles, air defence, naval, space and command systems.

nodes.name: Diehl Defence
nodes.description: Air defence, guided missiles, ammunition and protection systems.

nodes.name: Fincantieri
nodes.description: Naval vessels and shipbuilding systems.

nodes.name: Patria
nodes.description: Armoured vehicles, lifecycle support and defence systems.

nodes.name: Bittium
nodes.description: Secure communications and defence/security systems.

nodes.name: Rohde & Schwarz Defence
nodes.description: Secure communications, electronic warfare, monitoring and test systems.

nodes.name: Helsing
nodes.description: Software and AI company focused on defence systems and autonomous capability.

nodes.name: Quantum Systems
nodes.description: Unmanned aerial systems and aerial intelligence.

nodes.name: TEKEVER
nodes.description: UAS and surveillance systems, including maritime ISR.

nodes.name: ARX Robotics
nodes.description: Autonomous ground systems and robotics for defence.

nodes.name: Unseenlabs
nodes.description: Maritime surveillance from space-based RF detection.

nodes.name: Safran AI / Preligens
nodes.description: AI-enabled intelligence/geospatial analysis associated with Safran AI.

nodes.name: Delair
nodes.description: Drones and aerial intelligence for industrial/security/defence-adjacent use cases.

nodes.name: Exotrail
nodes.description: Space logistics/mobility and satellite maneuvering services with defence-adjacent relevance.

nodes.name: HarfangLab
nodes.description: Cybersecurity/EDR company relevant to sovereign defence and critical infrastructure.

nodes.name: Sentrycs
nodes.description: Counter-drone cyber/RF system company for critical infrastructure/security markets.

nodes.name: FCAS / SCAF
nodes.description: European future air combat programme involving manned/unmanned systems and combat cloud concepts.

nodes.name: MGCS
nodes.description: Future Franco-German main ground combat system concept.

nodes.name: Eurodrone
nodes.description: European medium-altitude long-endurance remotely piloted aircraft programme.

nodes.name: Rafale Ecosystem
nodes.description: French combat aircraft ecosystem with aircraft, engines, sensors, electronic warfare and weapons integration.

nodes.name: Eurofighter Ecosystem
nodes.description: European combat aircraft ecosystem with major UK/German/Italian/Spanish industry participation.

nodes.name: Aster / SAMP-T Ecosystem
nodes.strategic_role: European air and missile defence system
nodes.description: Aster missiles and SAMP/T air defence ecosystem.

nodes.name: IRIS-T SLM Ecosystem
nodes.description: German-led air defence ecosystem around Diehl Defence and partners.

nodes.name: Naval Combat Systems
nodes.description: Combat management systems, sensors, weapons integration, sonar/radar and ship lifecycle support.

nodes.name: Military Satcom / Secure Connectivity
nodes.description: Satellite communications and secure connectivity for government/defence users.

nodes.name: Galileo PRS Capability
nodes.description: Encrypted navigation service for government-authorised users.

nodes.name: Counter-UAS Capability
nodes.description: Detection, tracking, identification and non-sensitive response coordination for drones around critical assets.

nodes.name: Battle Management / C2 Software
nodes.description: Software for command, control, situational awareness, data fusion and interoperability.

nodes.name: Defence Procurement / Supplier Data
nodes.description: Structured data about suppliers, capabilities, procurement priorities and industrial dependencies.

nodes.name: Semiconductor / Electronics Dependency
nodes.description: Advanced chips, FPGAs, sensors, processors, secure components and electronics supply exposure.

nodes.name: Energetics / Propellants / Explosives Dependency
nodes.description: Propellants, explosives, solid rocket motors and specialist chemicals/materials for munitions and missiles.

nodes.name: Critical Raw Materials
nodes.description: Titanium, rare earths, energetic precursors, specialty metals, composites and secure supply chains.

nodes.name: Skilled Defence Workforce
nodes.description: Engineers, technicians, manufacturing workers, cybersecurity specialists and cleared talent.

nodes.name: Test Ranges / Qualification / Certification
nodes.description: Facilities and processes required to test, validate, qualify and certify defence systems.

nodes.name: Interoperability Standards
nodes.description: Standards, interfaces and integration requirements for coalition operations.

nodes.name: Secure Cloud / Edge Compute
nodes.description: Secure compute, edge deployment and data infrastructure for AI, C2, ISR and autonomy.

nodes.name: Classified Compliance / Export Control
nodes.description: Export controls, clearance, classified handling, cyber requirements and procurement eligibility.

nodes.name: Supply Chain Visibility Gap
nodes.description: Fragmented supplier and dependency data across defence, dual-use and industrial base.

DG DEFIS manages Commission defence industry and space activity; EDIS is the EU defence industrial strategy.
EDF is implemented directly by the Commission and supports collaborative defence R&D.
EUDIS is implemented through the EDF innovation layer and supports disruptive defence technologies.
EDIS emphasizes strengthening the European Defence Technological and Industrial Base and readiness.
EDF funds collaborative R&D and capability development across domains including critical technologies.
French defence procurement and strategic investment are relevant for national dual-use opportunities.
French and EU defence innovation pipelines are adjacent opportunity channels for dual-use startups.

MBDA is a European group with major Airbus participation; exact ownership should be enriched from official company governance sources.
MBDA is connected to BAE Systems through its multinational ownership structure; exact ownership should be enriched.
MBDA is connected to Leonardo through its multinational ownership structure; exact ownership should be enriched.

KNDS/Nexter heritage makes it strategically relevant to French-German land systems and procurement.

opportunities.title: European defence supplier dependency intelligence platform
opportunities.reason: EDIS pushes industrial readiness, but the supply base is fragmented. A structured dependency graph for suppliers, bottlenecks, capabilities and national/EU fit can serve primes, investors and public agencies.

opportunities.title: EDF / EDIP proposal and consortium workspace for SMEs
opportunities.reason: EDF/EUDIS/EDIP opportunities are hard for SMEs to navigate. A workspace that matches capabilities, partners, eligibility, calls and documentation can lower barriers into defence innovation.

opportunities.title: Counter-UAS command and evidence console for critical infrastructure
opportunities.reason: Drone threats are rising across military and civilian critical sites. A software layer for detection evidence, incident workflow, integration and compliance can avoid building weapons while serving real demand.

opportunities.title: Secure combat-cloud connector layer for European defence systems
opportunities.reason: Airbus and European air-combat concepts point toward multi-domain combat cloud and interoperable C2. The gap is not only platforms; it is secure connectors, schemas, adapters and audit layers.

opportunities.title: Defence export-control and classified-compliance OS
opportunities.reason: European defence/dual-use companies face export controls, classified handling, cybersecurity and procurement eligibility. A software OS for compliance evidence and workflows is accessible and B2B-heavy.

opportunities.title: Ammunition and energetics supply-chain observability
opportunities.reason: Ammunition/energetics is a red bottleneck. A non-weapon software layer for capacity, supplier risk, lead times, materials and production readiness can support primes and ministries.

opportunities.title: Fleet readiness and predictive maintenance platform for defence assets
opportunities.reason: European forces need higher readiness from existing assets. Maintenance data, spares visibility, lifecycle support and predictive alerts are software-accessible compared with building platforms.

opportunities.title: Space ISR tasking and fusion layer for maritime/security users
opportunities.reason: Europe has space ISR actors and secure connectivity programmes. A layer for tasking, fusing and delivering maritime/geospatial intelligence can serve public security and defence-adjacent users.

opportunities.title: Synthetic training and mission rehearsal toolkit for European SMEs
opportunities.reason: EDF highlights simulation, multi-domain operations and critical technologies. SMEs/primes need reusable simulation/training components without rebuilding bespoke environments every time.

opportunities.title: Defence procurement radar for founders and investors
opportunities.reason: Defence opportunities are scattered across EU, national, NATO and prime channels. A radar that tracks calls, tenders, capability gaps, supplier needs and fit scores can help founders position intelligently.

opportunities.title: Dual-use startup security-clearance and procurement readiness pathway
opportunities.reason: Promising dual-use startups hit friction around security, procurement, documentation, pilots and trust. A guided readiness pathway can prepare them for primes and public buyers.

opportunities.title: European interoperability test harness for defence software
opportunities.reason: Fragmentation and interoperability are central defence pain points. A test harness that validates schemas, APIs, data exchange, audit logs and security controls could serve C2, ISR and combat-cloud teams.
